title: YVtils SMP
description:
SMP - Survival Multi-Player -
YVtils-SMP adds many new features to your Survival Server
body:
![Plugin Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/09150c8023527c6d96b077e65b19f8b2e1339cd0.png)

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gQi54Pd_SWE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

> ⚠️ **Disclaimer**
>
> This plugin does **not** support spigot or version < 1.21

---

# Modules

## Discord Module
Also available as standalone Plugin [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/yvtils-dc)

- Tutorial: [Discord Module Setup Guide](https://youtu.be/YQiYSjEcdMk)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YQiYSjEcdMk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- Chat Sync

  ![You want to chat with players on your server without joining it? With Chat Sync you can write in a discord channel and start a conversation with all players on the server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/edf0531dd70219060e19cce64b950dbda24c5137.png)

- Minecraft Server Stats

    ![Minecraft Server Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/a1236bf2d7c73a307c13c2059c1b8771c9a339b8.png)
    ![Minecraft Server Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/3e3878ef0586631de3798069bfd3f5b0c2ff2c2f.png)

- Console Sync

    ![Console Sync](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/3ac4d9fb20ba844d17f1f3958f7fe3aa1366a8a6.png)

- Whitelist with Discord

## Status Module

`/status set <status>`
`/status default <status>`
`/status clear [player]`

Let players set a status before their name.

![Status](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/01813e22083d4710f146a17cadaeade7a0a7ec52.png)

## Sit Module

`/sit`

Let players sit down everywhere.

![Sit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/1abc13177a60058aa9f428cb6fef5347e10ff400.png)

## Extended Vanish Module

`/v [quick]`

- Silent Container Interaction
- No Mob Targeting
- Ignore dropped items
- Layer System
  - Higher Layer Players can see Lower Layer Players, but not vice versa.
  
![Vanish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/24fc01087eae711506b9270223ac734dfa5c06e0.png)

## Moderation Module

- Ban Command `/ban <player> [reason]`
- Tempban Command `/tempban <player> <time> <unit> [reason]`
- Kick Command `/kick <player> [reason]`
- Mute Command `/mute <player> [reason]`
- Tempmute Command `/tempmute <player> <time> <unit> [reason]`
- Unban Command `/unban <player>`
- Unmute Command `/unmute <player>`

## Fusion Module / Custom Crafting

`/fusion [manage]`

- Let players craft custom items
  - Invisible Item Frames

    ![Invisible Item Frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/dc62951ee122d8b02227d5c73d2f88b365008013.png)

  - Light Blocks

    ![Light Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/eaffb2320a2ad2e4b99263d1105c63be4596081e.png)

  - Custom Player Heads

    ![Custom Player Head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/6f97314b3637ccd831eed3596fc92357a7793e46.png)

- Manange existing or create new fusions

  ![FusionCreate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/ef0c2b98f2fde915a419ddacd2707c039354c577.png)

![Fusion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/d41df9922086a742ae47262c54a6f0671eb582e9.png)

## MultiMine Module (VeinMiner & Timber)
Also available as standalone Plugin [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/yvtils_mm)

`/mm add [block]`
`/mm addMultiple`
`/mm remove [block]`
`/mm removeMultiple`

- MultiMine Blocks
- Add/Remove multiple blocks at once with a contaimer in your hand

![MultiMine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/6c0453c34457536349ea6fff36536d7474f30adc.gif)
![MultiMine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/c9db0e0a279c011e0cd29076194ae20795c014d6.gif)

## Server Module

- Maintenance Mode
- Custom MOTD
  
  ![Custom MOTD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/69b891fa390a96a11057ac0f0ba08eb808515319.png)
- Fake Max Player Count
- Customizable Player Info Text

    ![Custom Player Info Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/f0429b2470c2f07fa2baa5043058428691e38d14.png)

## Waypoints Module

`/waypoint <naviagte/create/delete> <name> [visibility]`

- Create waypoints with visibilities
  - Public - Everyone can see it
  - Private - Only you can see it
  - Unlisted - Only you can see it, but others can navigate to it
- Navigate to waypoints

![Waypoints](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/3928ae8dbe05a95513fb8cfee936225ad5d7de68.jpeg)

## Other Features

- Anti Too Expensive
  - Bypasses the "Too Expensive" Enchantment Limit

  ![Anti Too Expensive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/762677517e8e42870bc67616bf16e8ba7fa9b17e.png)

- MSG System
  - `/msg <player> <message>`
  - `/r <message>`

  ![MSG System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/191fc65fc382c8304940bfb01bd42b852f49e941.png)

- Spawn Elytra

![Spawn Elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zmwYECuH/images/361693d8adb5d5a43574af383373811f38795bde.png)

# Commands
- Fly Command `/fly [player]`
- Heal Command `/heal [player]`
- Speed Command `/speed <speed> [player]`
- God Command `/god [player]`
- GlobalMute Command `/gmute [state]`
- Gamemode Command `/gm <gamemode> [player]`
- Seed Command `/seed show`

# Other

## Smart Language System

The Plugin supports English and German (Deutsch) as languages currently. If a player has one of the two languages selected as their game language, most messages sent to them will be localized

- [Request Features](https://github.com/YVtils/YVtils-SMP/issues/new?assignees=&labels=feature+request&template=feature_request.md&title=) or 
[Discord](https://yvtils.net/yvtils/support)
